extract: Poni Plains (Japanese: ポニの広野 Poni Plains) is a location on Poni Island in Alola, located north of Poni Grove, southeast of Poni Meadow and Plains Grotto, and southwest of Poni Coast. In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, Anabel and Looker will block the way to Poni Coast until the Ultra Beast incident in Poni Grove is resolved.
